name: Midnight Glass
summary: Nocturnal deep-blue vibrancy glass with a single restrained cyan-neon accent; premium, focused, frosted-dark.
palette: #0A0E1A bg · #46E6D0 neon accent · #0F1525 glass base · rgba(255,255,255,.06) glass fill · #E8ECF6 text · #7E89A6 muted · #6E8EFB color-chip
concept: Deep blurred midnight glass with a single electric-cyan neon accent

name: Paper & Ink
summary: A warm editorial light theme for Ditto: cream paper surfaces, ink-dark text, a single oxblood-red accent, and a serif wordmark/numerals for a calm, literary feel.
palette: paper #fcfaf4 / #f6f2e8 · ink #2b2218 · muted ink #6c6049 · accent oxblood #9a3b2e · chip fill #efe9db · link #4a5fb0 · swatch #6E8EFB · stage #cfc7b8
concept: Paper & Ink — a floating sheet of warm cream stationery with ink text and a single oxblood accent; serif voice for identity and numerals, sans for content, mono for code.

name: Brutalist Mono
summary: A stark high-contrast brutalist clipboard bar: monospaced type, hard 2px black borders, flat off-white fills, no shadows or rounding, with a single acid-yellow accent for the active state.
palette: #F2F0E9 paper · #111111 ink · #E8FF3A acid · #8A8780 mute · #D9D6CC line-fill · #FFFFFF card
concept: Raw structural brutalism — monospaced grid, hard borders, flat fills, one acid accent doing all the signaling work.

name: Sunset Warmth
summary: Warm, inviting, dusk — coral-amber-peach gradients glowing on a soft dark-plum base.
palette: #1a0f18 base, #241420 bar, #FF7A59 coral, #FFB36B amber, #FFD9A8 peach-glow, #F2C9B4 warm-text, #B98A82 muted-rose, #6E8EFB clip-swatch
concept: Coral/amber/peach gradients glowing on a soft dark-plum glass bar — a cozy dusk clipboard.

name: Forest Calm
summary: A grounded, restful menu-bar clipboard bar in muted sage, moss, and bark earth tones — low saturation, organic, and quietly natural.
palette: #2E342B bark · #3B4536 deep moss · #5B6B4F moss accent · #7C8A6B sage · #A7B295 lichen · #EDEAE0 parchment · #F4F2E9 card · #C9CBB8 hairline · #8A8B7A meta · #6E8EFB (clip data only)
concept: A bark-and-moss translucent floating bar — sage accents, parchment cards, diffuse organic shadows — that feels grounded and restful rather than digital.

name: Arctic (Nord)
summary: A cool, desaturated Nord-palette clipboard bar: polar-night slate grounds with frost blue/teal accents, engineered spacing and quiet vibrancy.
palette: #2E3440 #3B4252 #434C5E #4C566A · #D8DEE9 #E5E9F0 #ECEFF4 · #8FBCBB #88C0D0 #81A1C1 #5E81AC · accent #88C0D0 · swatch #6E8EFB
concept: Nord polar-night floating bar with frost-cyan single-accent signaling and SF-Mono developer typography.

name: Synthwave
summary: Electric retro-80s clipboard bar: deep purple/navy base with neon magenta and cyan glows, a subtle perspective grid and scanline shimmer.
palette: #13072b base · #1d0f3d / #2a1657 panel · #ff3db5 magenta · #33e1ff cyan · #b06bff violet · #f5ecff text
concept: Neon CRT clipboard — a synthwave glow-bar with perspective grid and scanlines.

name: High-Contrast Accessible
summary: A WCAG AAA accessibility-first take on Ditto: near-black canvas, pure-white text, thick 3px borders, bold 3px focus rings, and an electric-yellow accent that never carries meaning alone.
palette: #0A0A0B bg · #16161A card · #FFFFFF text · #FFE600 accent/focus · #000000 on-accent · #00E5FF link · #6E8EFB swatch · #FF4D6D pinned
concept: Accessibility-first dark UI where contrast, thick borders, redundant state cues, and large bold type are the aesthetic.

name: Solarized
summary: Ditto in the classic Solarized Light skin: a warm parchment base (base3 #fdf6e3) with base2 panels, low-contrast base01/base00 ink, and the canonical restrained accents — cyan #2aa198, yellow #b58900, violet #6c71c4, blue #268bd2, magenta #d33682.
palette: base3 #fdf6e3 · base2 #eee8d5 · base1 #93a1a1 · base01 #586e75 · base00 #657b83 · cyan #2aa198 · yellow #b58900 · violet #6c71c4 · blue #268bd2 · magenta #d33682
concept: Solarized Light as an instrument panel: warm parchment neutrals with the canonical accent set used strictly as semantic signals.

name: Swiss Grayscale
summary: An ultra-minimal Swiss/International-Style clipboard bar: near-monochrome greyscale on warm off-white paper, a strict baseline grid, Helvetica-neutral type, and a single hairline-red accent used only for the active state, the focus caret, and the pinned tick.
palette: #FAFAF8 paper · #FFFFFF card · #0A0A0A ink · #6B6B68 grey · #9A9A96 muted · #E2E2DD hairline · #D8261C accent
concept: Near-monochrome International-Style bar on a strict grid; one vermilion accent reserved for active/focus/pinned/selected states only.

name: Ditto Command Roster
summary: A dense, command-palette-style vertical list: each clip is one full-width row reading kind-glyph · content · source · time, optimized for fast top-to-bottom scanning instead of a horizontal card strip.
palette: Dark slate surfaces (#15181f / #1c2029), hairline borders, one calm blue accent (#5b8cff), white/grey text (#e7eaf0 / #8b93a3)
concept: Vertical command-roster list. A header bar holds the Ditto title + focused search field; below it a row of category chips; then a single scrollable column where every clip is one full-width row built on a fixed grid: [kind glyph] · [content + inline tags] · [source label] · [char count] · [relative time]. One pinned row (clip 3) carries a pin badge on the left rail; one selected row (clip 6) shows a blue accent rail + tinted background + focus border. A keyboard-hint footer pins to the bottom.

name: Polaroid Grid
summary: A 2-row grid of square-ish polaroid cards: each clip is a framed "photo" tile with a thick white-ish caption strip below holding source, content and meta — playful, tactile, visual-first.
palette: Dark slate surfaces (#161a21 / #1d222b), warm off-white polaroid frames (#f4f1ea), one calm blue accent (#6E8EFB), white/grey text
concept: Outer dark floating bar with header (title + chips left, focused search right). Body is a CSS grid, 2 rows x 4 columns of square-ish polaroid cards. Each card = warm off-white frame with rounded corners, soft drop shadow and slight rotation jitter; top = the "photo" (a tinted preview area whose fill encodes the content type — gradient image, solid color swatch, mono code, link, mail, sql), bottom = a caption strip with source label, tag chips and a meta footer (char count + relative time). Pinned card (Mail) has a brass pin dot and ribbon; selected card (TablePlus SQL) sits straight, lifted, with a blue focus ring. A keyboard-hint footer pinned to the bottom.

name: Spotlight Palette
summary: A search-first command palette: a full-width focused search field crowns the bar, clipboard clips become a scannable vertical result list with type-specific glyph icons on the left, and a dedicated right-hand preview pane renders the highlighted clip in full with metadata.
palette: Dark slate surfaces (#0f1420 / #161c2b), one calm blue accent (#4f7cff), white/grey text (#f2f4f8 / #8a94a8)
concept: Search-first vertical-list command palette with split body: top header band (Ditto wordmark + category chips) sits above a prominent focused search field; below, a two-column body — left 58% is a scrollable vertical result list (each row = type glyph icon, source label, truncated content, tag chips, char-count/time footer, with one pinned and one selected row), right 42% is a sticky preview pane showing the highlighted clip rendered large with full content and metadata; a keyboard-hint footer pins the bottom.

name: Spine
summary: A vertical time spine runs down the left edge; clipboard cards are grouped under chronological headers (Just now / Earlier today / Yesterday), each anchored to a glowing node on the spine so the eye reads WHEN every clip was copied before WHAT it is.
palette: Dark slate surfaces (#0f141b → #1a212c), one calm blue accent (#5b8def), white/grey text — restrained and neutral.
concept: A vertical TIME SPINE pinned to the left. Three time buckets (Just now / Earlier today / Yesterday) each have a header row with a node dot on the spine; the six clip cards hang to the right of the spine under their bucket, so vertical position encodes recency. Header bar on top holds the Ditto title, category chips, and a focused search field; a keyboard-hint footer pins the bottom.

name: Masonry Wall
summary: A Pinterest-style masonry of variable-height clipboard cards, each sized exactly to its content — a color chip stays tiny, the pinned email grows tall, the image takes a medium block. Density comes from content-fit packing, not uniform rows.
palette: Dark slate surfaces (#0f141b → #1a212c), one calm blue accent (#6E8EFB), white/grey text (#e8ecf2 / #8b95a5)
concept: A borderless rounded floating bar. Top: left wordmark "Ditto" + category chip row, right a focused search field. Middle: a 4-column CSS masonry (column-count) where cards flow top-to-bottom and pack by intrinsic height — color chip is ~64px, image is medium, the pinned email is the tallest card. Each card carries a source-app label, content (truncated tastefully), optional tag chips, a meta footer (char count + relative time), with one pinned ribbon (clip 3) and one selected card with an accent ring (clip 6). Bottom: keyboard-hint footer.

name: Spotlight + Rail
summary: Master-detail clipboard bar: a large focused preview of the selected clip on the left, with a thin vertical scrollable rail of the remaining clips as compact chips on the right.
palette: Dark slate surfaces (#16181d / #1c1f26 / #23272f), one calm blue accent (#5b8cff), white/grey text (#f4f6fb / #9aa3b2), subtle white borders.
concept: Master-detail. A 1180x520 floating bar split into a header (title Ditto + category chips left, focused search field right), a body divided into a large left PREVIEW pane (the selected clip 6 shown big: source app, full content, tags, metadata, quick actions) and a thin right RAIL listing the other clips as small stacked chips (one highlighted as selected, one pinned), and a bottom keyboard-hint footer. Not all-cards-equal — one spotlight, the rest demoted to a scrollable rail.

name: Kind Tabs
summary: Clip KIND becomes the primary navigation: a strong segmented tab bar (All/Pinned/Text/Links/Colors/Images/Files) sits as the structural spine of the bar, each tab carrying its own glyph and live count. The active tab drives a focused, kind-aware card area below — so the bar reads as "you are browsing Text" rather than a single mixed strip.
palette: Dark slate surfaces (#0f1419 / #1a212b), one calm blue accent (#4f7cff), white/grey text (#f2f5f9 / #8a96a6)
concept: Kind-first navigation. A bold horizontal segmented tab bar is the main structure (each tab = a clip kind, with glyph + count), replacing the usual flat chip strip. The active tab ("All") sets a focused context header and a card grid scoped to that kind. Title "Ditto" anchors the top-left; a focused search field sits top-right. Cards live in a scrollable strip; a keyboard-hint footer pins to the bottom.

name: Ditto — Plainline
summary: An ultra-dense plain-text list: each clip is a single tall line — a faint monochrome kind glyph, the content as the headline, a quiet source/meta column, and a right-aligned time. No cards, no fills, just rhythm and a hairline accent.
palette: Dark slate (#0f1217 / #161b22 surfaces), hairline #ffffff0d, calm blue accent #6E8EFB, white #e8ecf2 / grey #8a93a3 text.
concept: A borderless rounded floating bar. Header row: "Ditto" wordmark left, focused search field right. Below it a single row of text-only category chips. The body is NOT a card strip but a plain list: a 6-column implicit grid per row — [kind glyph | headline content (with inline tags) | source app | meta/char-count | time]. Rows are separated only by 1px hairlines; the selected row gets a faint blue wash + left accent bar + caret; the pinned row gets a small pin glyph in the time column. Footer is a thin keyboard-hint strip.

name: Coverflow Carousel
summary: A 3D coverflow strip where one hero clip stands tall and frontal at center while neighbors recede in rotated, dimmed perspective — the selected SQL card is the hero, others tease at the edges.
palette: Dark slate surfaces (#171e28 / #1b2330 cards), single calm blue accent (#5b8cff), white/grey text (#f4f6fa / #8a94a6).
concept: A borderless rounded bar in three stacked zones. Top chrome: left "Ditto" title + category chip row, right a focused search field with caret. Center: a 3D coverflow stage (perspective container) — six clip cards laid along an arc. The hero (clip 6, SELECTED SQL) is frontal/large at center with a blue selection ring; immediate neighbors are scaled ~0.9 and rotateY'd ±40deg, outer ones ~0.82 and rotated ±52deg with falling opacity, so they peek/angle in from the edges. The pinned Mail clip carries a pin badge. A dot scrubber shows position. Bottom: keyboard-hint footer. Hierarchy is depth-driven, not size-equal.

name: Ditto Dashboard
summary: An information-rich home dashboard: a left quick-filter sidebar (kinds + tags), a pinned-clips section up top, and a recent-clips grid below — replacing the single strip with a structured, scannable command-center layout.
palette: Dark slate surfaces (#0f1320 / #161b2b / #1c2336), one calm blue accent (#6E8EFB / #5B7CFA), white-to-grey text (#f4f6fb / #aab2c5 / #6b7governed → #6b7488)
concept: Three-zone dashboard. Left: fixed 222px quick-filter sidebar with a KINDS list (All active, Pinned, Text, Links, Colors, Images, Files — each with a live count) and a TAGS cloud below, plus a local-storage meter. Right column: a header row pairing the "Ditto" wordmark area, horizontal category chips, and a focused search field (blue border + focus-ring glow + caret); then a "Pinned" section header and one wide pinned card (clip 3); then a "Recent" header and a 3-column card grid holding clips 1, 2, 6, 4, 5 plus a "213 more" overflow tile — clip 6 carries the selected affordance (blue ring, tint, SELECTED flag). A full-width keyboard-hint footer (return Paste · ⌘C Copy · delete Delete · esc Close) plus a clip counter sits at the bottom of the right column.
